query: Simba Voice Agents: Daily Top Product review

results.title: OpenAI wants your launches
results.content:
🔥 Our Take: Your trackpad has had a haptic engine since 2015, and in ten years its only job has been faking the feel of a click. Breva is the first app we've seen use it for something human: the Mac physically breathes under your finger. Meditation apps live on your phone, the same device serving you the stress. Putting the two-minute reset inside the machine you work on, one keystroke from whatever spiked your heart rate, is the right placement. One commenter said it feels "like the mac itself is breathing with you." That's the whole product, and it's enough.

### Top forum threads [...] So we teamed up with OpenAI to put credits behind it. Build something with Sol, Terra, or Luna, schedule your launch for Thursday, July 23, and the top products walk away with $10k in OpenAI credits.

If you're going to kick the tires anyway, might as well get paid for it. You've got nine days: schedule your launch for July 23.

## Cards that die on purpose

Agentcard gives your AI agent its own debit card: fund a wallet, set a budget, and it issues single-use cards that close themselves the moment a charge clears. Karen Serfaty (@keyserfaty) was running Atlas when Remote acquired it, then turned down a job at Stripe to build this instead.

results.title: Speechify: Your AI Voice Assistant
results.content:
used Speechify to build Simba Voice Agents

•5 reviews

Simba 3.2 is the voice model behind Speechify, the reading app 60M+ people use every day. Every gain in quality, latency, and cost had to survive real users paying real subscriptions first, which is exactly why it holds up in production. Same model, now on our API.

Review Speechify?

Reviews

Most Informative [...] Simba 3.2 just went #1 on Artificial Analysis, and on Voice Arena it's the top real-time model for both quality and price, at $6 per 1M characters, the cheapest in the top ten. Capable of sub-100ms latency, streaming-native, with real emotion and SSML control. It's the same model that powers our consumer apps for 60M+ people, now rolling out on our new developer platform across SpeechifyAI Agents and SpeechifyAI Build, with a REST API and first-party TypeScript and Python SDKs.

Most labs built for the benchmark and priced for the enterprise. We built for listeners and priced for production.
